postReview.title: Switzerland 1-4 Spain: Fabian brace leads 10-man La Roja to victory
postReview.description: Fabian Ruiz led Spain to 4-1 victory over Switzerland in the Nations League after Robin Le Normand had seen red early in the first half.

preReview.title: Rodri 'will have to start playing', says Spain boss De la Fuente
preReview.description: Luis de la Fuente has declared Manchester City midfielder Rodri will "start without risk" as Spain meet Switzerland in the Nations League.
